synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-21312 Oracle Linux 8 .NET 8.0 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-21312
description:
[8.0.122-1.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[8.0.122-1]
- Update to .NET SDK 8.0.122 and Runtime 8.0.22
- Resolves: RHEL-125737
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-21312

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-21312.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
aspnetcore-runtime-8.0-8.0.22-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
aspnetcore-runtime-dbg-8.0-8.0.22-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
aspnetcore-targeting-pack-8.0-8.0.22-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
dotnet-apphost-pack-8.0-8.0.22-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
dotnet-hostfxr-8.0-8.0.22-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
dotnet-runtime-8.0-8.0.22-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
dotnet-runtime-dbg-8.0-8.0.22-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
dotnet-sdk-8.0-8.0.122-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

dotnet-templates-8.0-8.0.122-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
aspnetcore-runtime-8.0-8.0.22-1.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
aspnetcore-runtime-dbg-8.0-8.0.22-1.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm

dotnet-hostfxr-8.0-8.0.22-1.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
dotnet-runtime-8.0-8.0.22-1.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
dotnet-runtime-dbg-8.0-8.0.22-1.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
dotnet-sdk-8.0-8.0.122-1.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
dotnet-sdk-8.0-source-built-artifacts-8.0.122-1.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm

SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/dotnet8.0-8.0.122-1.0.1.el8_10.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[8.0.122-1.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[8.0.122-1]
- Update to .NET SDK 8.0.122 and Runtime 8.0.22
- Resolves: RHEL-125737
